source: claude-haiku-4-5 over data/omeda/heroes.json ability text only; every number ground-checked against the ability, failing lines dropped

wraith.E: Reset cooldown on takedowns for repeated escapes; use enhanced jump to reposition aggressively after marking targets.
wraith.LMB: Use basic attacks to farm minions and harass enemies safely from range between ability casts.
wraith.RMB: Mark targets with Peekaboo first, then Knock, Knock deals bonus damage; hold for killing blows to reset cooldown.
wraith.Q: Launch to slow and mark enemies, setting up Knock, Knock for massive bonus damage within 3.5s window.
wraith.R: Teleport enemies back 2 seconds to catch them out of position; coordinate with team for guaranteed follow-up.
wraith.Passive: Deploy Sonar Drone in jungle and river to detect enemies through walls at 1000 unit range.

wukong.LMB: Use basic attacks to build up the 5 hits needed for clones; position yourself safely while farming.
wukong.RMB: In Spirit form, use the 40% slow for kiting; in Body form, use the push to separate enemies from teamfights.
wukong.Q: Body form gives 40% attack speed for 4s—use it after landing hits to maximize damage output quickly.
wukong.E: Spirit form's 25% damage reduction lets you tank damage; Body form's distance scaling rewards jumping from high ground.
wukong.R: Every 5 hits spawns a clone; switch stances based on situation: Spirit for defense, Body for offense.
wukong.Passive: Double jump for repositioning, chasing, or escaping—use it to reach unexpected angles or over obstacles.

zinx.LMB: Stack the DoT on enemies by hitting them repeatedly; it deals 12-42.6 damage per hit over 3 seconds.
zinx.RMB: Use on allies below 50% health for the 40% bonus healing; prioritize saving low teammates.
zinx.Q: Throw into grouped enemies to stun multiple targets; the disk ricochets 5 times at 50% stun duration each.
zinx.E: Position the pool where enemies must walk through; it hits twice with a 0.75s delay between eruptions.
zinx.R: Use before a teammate takes lethal damage to resurrect them with 500-1300 health after 2.5 seconds.
zinx.Passive: Hit enemy heroes to stack up to 5 stacks; at max stacks, gain 25% movement speed and +75% Infuse healing.

kallari.R: Use on low-health enemies to maximize the 2.5x damage scaling from their missing health pool.
kallari.LMB: Use between ability casts to build Death Mark stacks and maintain constant pressure in fights.
kallari.RMB: Save charges for slowing fleeing targets or bursting minions/monsters with the 130 bonus damage.
kallari.Q: Activate before rotating to lanes to heal passively, then gank with the 40% movement speed boost.
kallari.E: Hold it to reposition safely, then dash toward Death Mark targets to deal 2x damage for burst.
kallari.Passive: Chain abilities quickly to apply Death Mark, then coordinate cooldowns to reapply before the 10s restriction ends.

grim-exe.LMB: Stack Pulsefire with basic attacks to trigger burst damage; use attack speed to apply and detonate faster.
grim-exe.RMB: Block high-impact enemy abilities to restore mana quickly; prioritize blocking ultimates and crowd control.
grim-exe.Q: Use in Sentry Mode for damage, switch to Assault Mode to displace and cleave enemies away.
grim-exe.E: Stack mana regeneration in Sentry Mode, then switch to Assault Mode for 1650 range cleave damage.
grim-exe.R: Channel locked onto priority targets; allies can body-block the orb to protect enemies from 740 damage.
grim-exe.Passive: Every other attack triggers 15 true damage; coordinate with abilities to burst Pulsefire consistently.

the-fey.LMB: Use between ability casts to maintain damage output and build toward your next ability rotation.
the-fey.RMB: Plant it preemptively on expected enemy paths; the 2s delay rewards prediction over reaction.
the-fey.Q: Cast it in teamfights to slow enemies and speed allies; the 5s duration covers multiple waves.
the-fey.E: Spam it on the same target within 8s to stack up to 4 times for massive damage and mana refunds.
the-fey.R: Hold it for grouped enemies; the 1s stun and pull combo enables follow-up damage from allies.
the-fey.Passive: After securing a takedown, use the spawned Untamed Growth and 30% speed to chase or rotate quickly.

lt-belica.Q: Use to initiate fights or peel allies—the 1s stun combo'd with basic attacks guarantees damage.
lt-belica.LMB: Spam between ability casts for consistent poke damage; each round applies separately for zoning.
lt-belica.RMB: Spam frequently for reliable mana restore (up to 10 per hit) and sustained wave clear.
lt-belica.E: Place defensively to drain enemy mana passively; zap triggers help control ability usage patterns.
lt-belica.R: Save to burst low-mana enemies or finish kills for cooldown reset in teamfights.

khaimera.LMB: Use basic attacks to build Rage stacks; each hit grants 4 Rage to fuel your cooldown reduction and movement speed.
khaimera.RMB: Leap to low-health enemies for up to 2x damage; the 25-45% slow helps secure kills or escape danger.
khaimera.Q: Activate to gain maximum attack speed for 5 attacks; each hit applies on-hit effects at 65% effectiveness and cleaves.
khaimera.E: Use instantly to cleanse debuffs and heal for 5-13% max health; grants 0.25s crowd control immunity for clutch survival.
khaimera.R: Channel to stun all enemies ahead for 1.25s and deal 200-600 damage across 6 hits; grants 20 Rage per target hit.
khaimera.Passive: Build Rage from damage to unlock 8% movement speed above 50 Rage and accelerate cooldowns by 0.5% per Rage point.

gideon.RMB: Launch at grouped enemies to slow all by 35% for 1.25s, setting up your team's engagement or securing escapes.
gideon.Q: Cast on clustered enemies for high damage; pairs well with Void Breach's slow to land meteor accurately.
gideon.E: Gain 150 max mana at level 5 while repositioning; leave portal open 5s for allies to follow through.
gideon.R: Channel 2.75s minimum before acting; each hero hit grants 2% bonus max mana, so target grouped enemies.
gideon.Passive: Chain abilities into empowered basic attacks to root targets for 1s, enabling combos or escapes.

drongo.LMB: Basic attack to apply Wastelander bleeds and stack Irradiate on enemies during Rad Rounds.
drongo.RMB: Use boomerang to slow and kite enemies; it returns for repeated hits on terrain bounces.
drongo.Q: Toss grenade to silence enemies and control space; gas applies Wastelander every 0.3s for 3s.
drongo.E: Activate to gain 20/22.5/25/27.5/30% attack speed; hit repeatedly to refresh Irradiate and trigger eruptions.
drongo.R: Blast to shred armor and damage; use in-air for mobility and CC immunity while pushing enemies back.
drongo.Passive: Your crits and abilities bleed enemies for 2.25% max health; focus bleeds stack with ability usage.

iggy-scorch.RMB: Cast Molotov to create a Fire Field lasting 2.5s; combine with Oil Spill for refresh and doubled damage.
iggy-scorch.Q: Place up to 3 Flame Turrets within 1500 units; they gain 40% Attack Speed against Heroes or during Inferno.
iggy-scorch.E: Roll Oil Spill to slow enemies 40% for 5s; ignite it with fire abilities to refresh duration and trigger Ignite.
iggy-scorch.R: Use Inferno for 20-30% Movement Speed and 3s cone damage; reactivate early to Knock Back Heroes with instant burst.
iggy-scorch.Passive: Stack Slick with basic attacks up to 5 times; slicked enemies take Ignite damage from all your fire abilities.

steel.LMB: Alternate light and heavy attacks; heavies deal 69 damage for burst, lights for sustained pressure.
steel.RMB: Stun enemies for 0.5s and deal up to 155 damage; great for interrupting enemy abilities or securing kills.
steel.Q: Charge through enemies, knock back heroes, and stun minions/monsters for 2s; use to engage or escape.
steel.E: Block projectiles for 4s and slow enemies 25-45% when they pass through; protect your team from poke.
steel.R: Jump and slam for 440 damage, knock up, and stun all enemies for 1.5s; perfect for teamfight initiation.
steel.Passive: Your shield refreshes after 10s without damage; play around it by backing off to reset between fights.

legion.LMB: Stop firing for 1.25s to automatically replenish ammo instead of waiting for full magazine reload.
legion.RMB: Hold the grenade to reduce fuse time, or throw immediately for the 0.2s auto-detonate near enemies.
legion.Q: Fire at terrain to deploy 10 mines for area control; consecutive hits deal only 25% damage to same target.
legion.E: Use for Unstoppable frames and infinite ammo, then keep allies within 1500 units for 8s healing and movement speed.
legion.R: Land designator then wait 0.75s for orbital beam to track enemies up to 6/7.5/9s; prioritizes heroes automatically.
legion.Passive: Buy 50 Ability Haste to make grenades deal extra missing health damage; 100 Physical Power boosts mine slow duration.

boris.Q: Use the 45/55/65/75/85% Movement Speed boost to chase or kite enemies along the Scent Trail before consuming the Mark.
boris.LMB: Stack your Passive Canisters by landing basic attacks on Heroes and Monsters to unlock Tesseract Core healing and damage.
boris.RMB: Dash through multiple enemies with both swipes to apply On-Hit effects and trigger your Passive Canister stacking twice.
boris.E: Hold the Barrier 0.5s minimum for Fear duration, then manually detonate early if you need the 40/55/70/85/100 damage burst.
boris.R: Grab the first enemy Hero you collide with to slam them for 250/350/450 damage and lock them down with 75% Slow.
boris.Passive: Build to max 4 Canisters for the Tesseract Core zap, which triggers your healing and damage On-Hit against enemies.

phase.LMB: Use between ability casts to maintain damage output while waiting for cooldowns to reset.
phase.RMB: Link your carry for power scaling, then reactivate to save them from danger or engage enemies.
phase.Q: Cast on both yourself and linked ally to blind enemies; hit heroes to reset your Blink cooldown to 1s.
phase.E: Channel on immobile targets to stack the 3% slow eight times and lock them down for 1.2s.
phase.R: Activate when engaging or defending; grants 50/75/100% attack speed and massive movement speed for 8s.
phase.Passive: Ability spam triggers constant 80 healing per cast; use often to sustain yourself and your linked ally.

murdock.LMB: Build stacks toward your Shots Fired passive for bonus range and damage on your 5th hit.
murdock.RMB: Use close-range Buckshot to maximize push force and armor shred before following up with basic attacks.
murdock.Q: Place traps defensively in choke points to root enemies for 1.25s and control map pressure.
murdock.E: Activate multiple times to stack attack speed up to 5 times, then unload basic attacks for burst.
murdock.R: Fire through terrain and armor at unlimited range to finish weakened enemies or initiate teamfights.
murdock.Passive: Land 5 basic attacks consecutively to unlock your next attack's 400 range boost and bonus damage.

terra.LMB: Build Hersir stacks with basic attacks to empower your abilities with enhanced effects.
terra.RMB: Channel for 1.25s to maximize damage to 297, then dash through enemies to gain shields.
terra.Q: Use on hero groups to refund cooldown with each hit, enabling rapid ability spam.
terra.E: Apply 20% armor reduction before big damage, or empower it to root enemies for 1.2s.
terra.R: Activate to disable towers for 5s, gain 44 armor/tenacity for 10s, and slow nearby enemies 60%.
terra.Passive: Return to base before fights to instantly max Hersir stacks for empowered abilities.

skylar.RMB: Stack damage up to 25 times against grouped enemies, then unleash massive on-hit physical damage.
skylar.Q: Land it early in fights to set up the 190 damage explosion; the 60% slow locks targets down.
skylar.E: Use the +100 range to kite while missiles trigger with each attack; abuse 3.75s hover time.
skylar.R: Channel wisely for guaranteed hero hits; missing health scaling rewards low-health targets for massive damage.

kira.RMB: Fire Mercy shots to apply 3 Vengeance stacks quickly; benefits from lifesteal and critical strikes for extra value.
kira.LMB: Use as your primary damage source between ability casts to build Vengeance stacks on enemies.
kira.Q: Stack Vengeance passively, then activate Dusk to purge stacks for damage plus 6-14 bonus damage per stack and 10-30% slow.
kira.E: Dash to safety or reposition, gaining 5-25 bonus physical power per stack; cooldown resets on takedowns for repeated escapes.
kira.R: Channel for 2.5s to deal massive area damage and reduce enemy healing by 45%; hold position and avoid casting other abilities.
kira.Passive: Wait for empowerment to trigger, then use basic attacks or Mercy to fire Ravens that deal area damage based on target's current health.

maco.LMB: Build stacks with basic attacks to reduce your next ability's cooldown by 1s, enabling faster combo chains.
maco.RMB: Reactivate early for shorter stuns, or let it travel far for up to 1.3s stun duration against fleeing enemies.
maco.Q: Heal allies and grant them 18 movement speed, or deal 195 damage to enemies—use situationally based on teamfight needs.
maco.E: Jump onto enemy heroes to gain a 280 shield, then dash away to safety while slowing them 30%.
maco.R: Charge up to 1s for maximum range and 1.4s stun, pushing and stunning all enemies along the gemstone's path.

revenant.LMB: Land four attacks to trigger automatic reload; the final round always crits, so position to maximize that critical hit damage.
revenant.RMB: Use active reload before fights to maintain momentum; passive scales crit damage to 160% max, rewarding crit builds heavily.
revenant.Q: Cast after landing Scar to make all 10 missiles prioritize the marked target instead of spreading randomly.
revenant.E: Apply 4 stacks then deal damage quickly to root enemies for 1s; each stack consumed deals bonus damage.
revenant.R: Pull isolated enemies into the Nether Realm for 6-8 seconds to steal their power and secure kills for 2x gold.
revenant.Passive: Build critical strike and attack speed to scale Physical Power up to 13.2% base, creating a snowball effect.

yin.RMB: Use the pressure sphere to block enemy projectiles and protect yourself or teammates from incoming damage.
yin.Q: Pull to enemies to deal damage and apply a 90% slow for 0.6s, then leap away to safety.
yin.E: Activate to extend your basic attack range to 1100 units and gain 70% cleave for 6s in fights.
yin.R: Surround yourself for 5s to slow enemies 10% and halt projectiles; repositioning tool against poke.

argus.LMB: Use between ability casts to build Disintegrate stacks and maintain consistent damage output.
argus.RMB: Channel continuously at max rank to spam low-cost projectiles and stack Disintegration quickly.
argus.Q: Lead moving targets and use the 1.2s stun at max rank to set up follow-up abilities.
argus.E: Deploy in teamfights to separate enemies with pushes, damage them for 2s, then pull them together.
argus.R: Hold it for low-health targets to maximize the 150% damage bonus, then slow fleeing enemies.

mourn.LMB: Use Extract procs between ability casts to restore health and deal bonus damage while abilities cooldown.
mourn.RMB: Hold the channel for full 1s range increase before confirming to maximize pull distance and damage.
mourn.Q: Cast on teammates for healing and armor, or enemies to reduce their defenses and deal damage.
mourn.E: Reactivate early for 0.45s mesmerize or hold full 2.1s for 1.2s mesmerize and 20% damage reduction.
mourn.R: Use to apply Contagion to all enemies globally while gaining 40/60/80% movement speed to engage.
mourn.Passive: Trigger Extract between abilities for 3-9% maximum health healing and 50% bonus magical damage.

grux.LMB: Stack Bloodlust bleeds on enemies before committing to fights for consistent damage scaling.
grux.RMB: Use Double Pain to hit multiple enemies and heroes for massive health restoration from missing health.
grux.Q: Channel longer to extend shockwave range, pull enemies together, and stun them for 0.75s setup.
grux.E: Charge through multiple enemies to drag heroes along, deal 260 damage, and slow them by 40%.
grux.R: Activate to stun nearby heroes, then attack Max Bloodlust enemies to extend the 8/10/12s buff duration.
grux.Passive: Keep basic attacks flowing to stack up to 6 bleeds dealing 25 damage each for guaranteed pressure.

bayle.LMB: Use the full 2.5x damage chain finisher to maximize burst damage in extended fights.
bayle.RMB: Cancel the leap early to slam immediately when enemies bunch up, then chase marked targets for 30% movement speed.
bayle.Q: Land all 3 slashes on one target to apply 5/10/15/20/25 bonus bleed damage every 0.5s for 3s.
bayle.E: Use the 5s buff window to trade damage, then heal back 10/14/18/22/26% of incoming damage when it ends.
bayle.R: Save this 135s cooldown ultimate for isolated enemy heroes to land the full 8-strike barrage.
bayle.Passive: Berserk below 40% health gives 40 Tenacity to survive, but watch the 20s cooldown between activations.

morigesh.LMB: Refresh Pestilence stacks on afflicted targets with basic attacks to maintain damage-over-time pressure.
morigesh.RMB: Mark heroes to enable soul healing; kill marked targets to refund 50% cooldown and 65% mana.
morigesh.Q: Use Hive to apply Pestilence and slow enemies by 50% before following up with other abilities.
morigesh.E: Dash through enemy heroes to refresh duration and deal 110-270 damage while restoring 30% as health.
morigesh.R: Cast Curse on marked heroes for 300-560 damage; the mark is consumed, so mark again afterward.
morigesh.Passive: Stack Pestilence up to 4 times on targets; it deals 0.14% max health damage every 0.5s.

muriel.LMB: Use as your consistent damage source between ability rotations to build toward ability cooldown reductions.
muriel.RMB: Charge for 1.1s to stun priority targets, or release early to slow multiple enemies while conserving mana.
muriel.Q: Place in teamfights to boost ally attack speed by 20% and damage enemies by 210 while reducing their attack speed.
muriel.E: Throw to shield allies for 240 and grant 25% movement speed, keeping it for 8s if no ally is nearby.
muriel.R: Fly to allies anywhere to grant 40% damage reduction and 680 shield, dealing 220 damage and knocking up nearby enemies.
muriel.Passive: Your damaging abilities reduce enemy healing by up to 45% and boost allied healing received by 12% per stack.

greystone.LMB: Your reliable damage source—use between ability casts to maintain pressure and build toward empowered hits.
greystone.RMB: Leap into fights for damage, then spam it again quickly since hitting enemies reduces cooldown by 35%.
greystone.Q: Stack it up to 4 times on enemies to shred their Physical Armor over 4s, weakening their defenses.
greystone.E: Use your next basic attack within 5s to cleave enemies and slow them 22-38%, then repeat the combo.
greystone.R: Activate when low health to restore up to 2.5x more, slow nearby enemies up to 70%, then crash down for damage.
greystone.Passive: Your basic attack deflection resets every 4.8-15s—stay aware and position to block dangerous incoming attacks.

rampage.LMB: Use after Pounce lands or between Rumble hits to maintain constant pressure and build Physical Power stacks.
rampage.RMB: Cancel early with basic attacks for positioning, or combine with active Boulder Throw to shatter it for area damage.
rampage.Q: Hold the boulder for setup plays, then throw to stun enemies for 1.4s maximum at higher ranks before it shatters.
rampage.E: Use frequently for the passive Physical Power stacking (up to 2.7%) and to slow enemies while dealing two hits of damage.
rampage.R: Activate when multiple enemies are near to maximize health restoration (up to 4% per second, plus 5% per hero nearby).
rampage.Passive: Farm jungle camps to double your regeneration, and rely on the 25 Tenacity trigger to survive crowd control chains.

riktor.Q: Lead with Q to destroy shields and silence before committing, preventing enemies from escaping or counterattacking.
riktor.LMB: Stick close after pulling with RMB to land multiple whip hits while enemies are vulnerable.
riktor.RMB: Pull isolated enemies toward your team or use to close gaps; the 10% max health damage scales against tanks.
riktor.E: Activate preemptively for the 20 shield and movement speed, then let damage ticks trigger pulses when enemies engage.
riktor.R: Save for grouped enemies since it suppresses for 1.3s then deals damage again as they break free.
riktor.Passive: Use Q and E to silence or immobilize enemies, freezing their cooldowns and giving your team a tactical advantage.

sevarog.LMB: Use basic attacks between ability casts to build damage output while cooldowns reset.
sevarog.RMB: Dash through grouped enemies to Fear multiple targets and reposition safely in teamfights.
sevarog.Q: Cast frequently on enemy heroes to steal their max health and deal bonus monster damage.
sevarog.E: Position in the center of fights so chained enemies take 135 damage and stun when escaping.
sevarog.R: Use at maximum rank to execute minions and knock back grouped enemy heroes from objectives.
sevarog.Passive: Kill with abilities to stack souls toward 160 for full power, gaining 400 health and 10% damage reflect.

shinbi.RMB: Dash through multiple enemies with both charges to maximize damage output in team fights.
shinbi.Q: Cast toward grouped enemies to hit multiple targets with the straight-line spirit wolf.
shinbi.E: Activate for the 20% movement speed boost and 2.4s shield when you need to escape or engage.
shinbi.R: Build 8 Track stacks by damaging heroes with abilities, then unleash 8 wolves per marked target.
shinbi.Passive: Land your enhanced basic attack every 10s for mana sustain and Track application.

kwang.RMB: Hold the Blade for 215 damage and 185 shield, or throw it first to deal 230 true damage when recalling during fights.
kwang.Q: Throw to tether enemies for 1.3s and gain vision, then recall early to break the tether and reposition safely.
kwang.E: Dash through enemies for damage, then grab the Blade within 300 units to knock up nearby enemies with lightning.
kwang.R: Channel to slow 65% for 2s, or if Blade is thrown, teleport to it first before striking for repositioning.
kwang.Passive: Land ability hits to stack electricity for 45% attack speed, then auto-attack to reset ability cooldowns by 0.5s per stack.

twinblast.LMB: Use after abilities to trigger Gunslinger's triple shot for burst damage and on-hit effects.
twinblast.RMB: Charge both grenades for sustained lockdown; use to kite enemies and secure kills with 30% slow.
twinblast.Q: Fire piercing projectiles through grouped enemies to apply 150% on-hit effectiveness to multiple targets.
twinblast.E: Spam abilities on heroes to reset cooldown fast; active dash escapes or chases with momentum.
twinblast.R: Unload 30 bullets over 3s for sustained damage; critical strikes at 75% effectiveness reward attack speed.
twinblast.Passive: Cast abilities constantly to maintain 20% attack speed buff and triple-shot basic attacks every 4s.

aurora.LMB: Use basic attacks to proc your passive Frost Storm, which deals scaling damage based on enemy max health.
aurora.RMB: Lead with Boreal Sweep to slow enemies 30-50%, then follow up with other abilities while they're vulnerable.
aurora.Q: Glacial Charge creates a 5s ice wall for allies to escape or chase; reactivate early if enemies destroy it.
aurora.E: Cast Hoarfrost when enemies are close to root them for 1-1.2s; the 2.5s ring catches multiple targets.
aurora.R: Cryoseism stuns after 1.5s then explodes; use it to lock down priority targets and damage nearby enemies.
aurora.Passive: Jump while airborne to spawn replicas that tank tower aggro; proc Frost Storm by hitting enemies 4 times.

dekker.E: Place the fence to block enemy rotations or trap targets inside with allies; lasts 2.6-3.2s depending on level.
dekker.LMB: Basic attack to farm minions and harass enemies from range; consistent damage source between ability casts.
dekker.RMB: Launch at grouped enemies to stun multiple targets; distance increases stun from 0.9s to 1.6s, so aim carefully.
dekker.Q: Fire the drone through enemy lines to damage and slow multiple targets; cooldown resets fast with ability spam.
dekker.R: Use for area denial and engage; center hits stun while edges slow for 1.5s at 50% reduced speed.
dekker.Passive: Jump mid-air to gain height and grant nearby allies 20% movement speed; cooldown resets 3s per ability cast.

akeron.LMB: Use basic attacks to build Hunger stacks toward Awakened state, which unlocks powerful ability enhancements.
akeron.RMB: Close distance before using to deal 1.35x damage, and use the roar while attached to terrain for area control.
akeron.Q: Pause the Eye mid-flight to adjust positioning, then refire to maximize the 35% slow and homing fireballs on grouped enemies.
akeron.E: Attach to terrain for up to 5s, then leap for guaranteed 1s stun and knockup on enemies caught below.
akeron.R: Use when enemies group up to execute targets under 12% health, healing for massive Missing Health percentage per bite.
akeron.Passive: Stack Hunger to 100 for Awakened status granting damage reduction and ability upgrades; take enemy damage intentionally to build stacks faster.

renna.LMB: Land consistent basic attacks to build pressure and trigger on-hit effects throughout fights.
renna.RMB: Farm Essence to generate additional projectiles, scaling your wave clear and poke damage.
renna.Q: Deploy Soul Orbs on low-health enemies for executions, or use the pull to lock down priority targets.
renna.E: Hold the ball for 1.5s to mesmerize multiple grouped enemies, or tap early for quick burst damage.
renna.R: Channel and teleport into fights to unleash 5s of sustained projectile damage on nearby enemies.
renna.Passive: Collect Essence drops from kills to directly strengthen all your abilities and radius.

gadget.RMB: Stop the droid mid-flight above grouped enemies to maximize the 2.5s damage and 20% slow effect.
gadget.Q: Land a basic attack immediately after attaching to trigger the empowered 100/140/180/220/260 damage explosion.
gadget.E: Block enemy advances by placing the gate in their path to Root for 1s while allies escape safely.
gadget.R: Use when enemies cluster together; the expanding dome covers 60% more area while shredding magical armor stacks.
gadget.Passive: Farm minions and monsters consistently to gain stacks, converting 6 stacks into permanent magical power for scaling.

adele.LMB: Use basic attacks to apply Thorns and enable allies' bonus damage; stack true damage for sustained pressure.
adele.RMB: Root enemies with this dash tool to escape or reposition; cooldown decreases significantly with leveling.
adele.Q: Gain mobility and immunity to slows while dealing damage twice; use to engage or kite effectively.
adele.E: Cast during other abilities for 30% damage reduction; attach Vines to enemies within 800u range.
adele.R: Interrupt incoming abilities and Root enemies for 0.75s in the central section; enemies take damage moving inside.
adele.Passive: Stack Thorns on enemies to amplify all allied damage by 7%; refresh duration with continued attacks.

zarus.LMB: Build stacks with basic attacks between abilities to maximize your Gladiator passive bonus damage.
zarus.RMB: Quick-release within 0.2s for cooldown refund, or channel fully against low-health targets for doubled damage.
zarus.Q: Hold the shield to reduce burst damage, then recast for the 135-295 damage and 0.75s stun combo.
zarus.E: Use mid-air to gain upward dash momentum, then attack during the 3.5s attack speed buff for sustained damage.
zarus.R: Jump at high-value targets to instantly maximize Gladiator stacks and secure permanent power if you finish them.

crunch.RMB: Dash to stun enemies for 0.25s, then combo with other abilities while they're locked down.
crunch.Q: Hit first enemy for full damage, chains reduce to 60%. Build Turbo stacks for empowered true damage.
crunch.E: Slow enemies by 50% for 1s and set up kills. Empowered version knocks up for 0.75s.
crunch.R: Every third hit against heroes/monsters heals you. Repeat your last ability for extended combos.
crunch.Passive: Each ability amplifies next basic attack with bonus magical damage and reduces cooldowns by 1s consistently.

serath.LMB: Use between ability casts to proc on-hit effects and maintain damage output during cooldowns.
serath.RMB: Cast to slow and gap-close enemies, resetting your attack timer for faster follow-up damage.
serath.Q: Mark targets before they escape, using the teleport to reposition safely after striking.
serath.E: Hover for up to 1.8s to scout and time your dive on grouped enemies or fleeing targets.
serath.R: Activate after takedowns via Passive to instantly reset cooldowns and dominate extended fights.
serath.Passive: Hunt downed enemies for demonic visages—touching them free-resets your abilities for massive plays.

sparrow.Q: Use to slow grouped enemies by up to 45% for 0.5s; 8 hits over 2.5s make it great for sustained pressure.
sparrow.E: Go invisible for 1.5s, then gain 45% attack speed for 6s; each basic against same target adds Relentless stacks.
sparrow.R: Fire 16 volleys over 3.5s that pierce enemies; center arrows deal more damage than sides and apply on-hit effects.

yurei.RMB: Launch all three projectiles to apply Soul Rip on multiple targets, setting up Severance cooldown resets.
yurei.Q: Cast mid-air to leap while dealing damage and healing up to 50% more if low health.
yurei.E: Rush into Soul Rip targets to reset cooldown and tear their soul, dealing continuous 8% max health damage.
yurei.R: Channel to apply Soul Rip, then pull and strike for massive damage while resetting Severance for follow-ups.
yurei.Passive: Weave basic attacks after every ability to deal bonus damage and trigger bounces across the battlefield.

feng-mao.LMB: Use as your primary damage source between ability cooldowns to build up sustained pressure on enemies.
feng-mao.RMB: Chain with takedowns to reset cooldown; use to chase or escape, dealing bonus damage based on enemy health.
feng-mao.Q: Hold for critical moments to block high-damage abilities and double your stat gains for 5 seconds afterward.
feng-mao.E: Use against single targets for 25-69 bonus damage per hit; combo twice for maximum slow and damage output.
feng-mao.R: Execute enemies below the health threshold; successfully executing resets cooldown for free recast within 20 seconds.
feng-mao.Passive: Stack takedowns early to gain permanent penetration bonuses that amplify all your physical damage throughout the game.

narbash.E: Toggle speed for roaming and map control; switch to healing when sustaining through poke damage.
narbash.LMB: Use as your primary damage source in extended fights; scales with physical power gained from Mosh Pit.
narbash.RMB: Lead with this 1.1s stun to initiate fights or peel threats; use the knockback to separate enemies.
narbash.Q: Activate during teamfights to grant allies up to 25% movement speed and 35 healing for 4 seconds.
narbash.R: Channel in backline to lock down grouped enemies; the 5-stack mesmerize prevents their escape or counterplay.
narbash.Passive: Position near multiple heroes to stack bonuses up to 10 armor and power per nearby champion.

eden.LMB: In melee, land the 4-hit chain before the heavy attack for consistent damage; in ranged, maintain distance and use the 8 rounds per second for sustained poke.
eden.RMB: Use ranged version to reposition and empower your next shot; melee version gaps targets and the 40% slow sets up your Q combo.
eden.Q: Ranged pierces through enemies for 50% reduced damage—line up multiple targets; melee spin into lightning strike applies 50% slow for guaranteed follow-up damage.
eden.E: Switch to melee when low health to gain 6-22% healing per hero damage; switch to ranged for 8-40 physical power boost when poking.
eden.R: Generate Heat to 300 by dealing hero damage; ranged ult slows for 1.5s and deals 50-200 per beam; melee ult lets you move the strike zone and slam for 100-385 damage.
eden.Passive: Build Heat steadily by trading with enemies; hold off on all-ins until you reach 300 Heat for ultimate access; convert Attack Speed items into Physical Power scaling.

neon.LMB: Your primary damage source; spam it between ability casts to build threads toward overclocked abilities.
neon.RMB: Dash to safety or chase, then land your empowered Jolt explosion on grouped enemies for massive damage.
neon.Q: Send the construct through enemies to damage them twice; Overclocked pulse at max range hits even harder.
neon.E: Lob it ahead of moving targets so they walk into the detonation; Overclocked Mesmerize locks them down.
neon.R: Activate to Overclock all abilities for 8s; recast mid-fight to jump and nuke with bonus damage from low-health targets.
neon.Passive: Track your threads; every third ability cast becomes Overclocked, so rotate your abilities for consistent power spikes.

countess.Passive: Land two ability hits within 4s on the same hero to trigger Haemorrhage for true damage and movespeed stacking.
countess.LMB: Use basic attacks between ability casts to maintain damage pressure and proc Blood Tithe's two-hit requirement.
countess.RMB: Cast on multiple enemies to maximize healing; against heroes you heal 450% more, making it devastating in teamfights.
countess.Q: Use the shadow swap within 3.5s to escape or reposition; the 25% slow helps land your other abilities.
countess.E: Cast through enemies in teamfights for consistent 80% scaling damage; it's a reliable way to trigger Blood Tithe.
countess.R: Save it for heroes already affected by Haemorrhage to deal 50% bonus damage and heal 100% of damage dealt back.

howitzer.Passive: Use abilities frequently to reset the cooldown and proc bonus damage on basic attacks for mana sustain against heroes.
howitzer.LMB: Follow up with Armed Salvo procs after using abilities to maximize burst damage and restore mana efficiently.
howitzer.RMB: Place grenades in choke points where enemies trigger multiple explosions for 10/15/20/25/30 damage and sustained 40% slowing.
howitzer.Q: Charge for the full 0.6s to deal max 280 damage; use the 1.3s hover time to reposition safely before firing.
howitzer.E: Reactivate early to catch fleeing enemies with the 0.5s stun and knockback before the 2.5s timer expires.
howitzer.R: Fire all 4 salvos of 8 missiles into grouped enemies to deal 960 damage over 4s while staying mobile in the sky.
